testcase.name: wifi_scan
testcase.description: Perform an active WiFi scan and verify that at least one AP is discovered.
testcase.preconditions: WiFi interface is up; driver firmware loaded.
testcase.expected_result: Scan completes; one or more APs reported.

testcase.name: wifi_connect
testcase.description: Connect to the configured WiFi network using WPA2-PSK credentials.
testcase.preconditions: WiFi interface is up; valid SSID and PSK configured in Kconfig.

steps.step: Retry on EAGAIN up to CONNECT_ATTEMPTS times.

testcase.expected_result: Connection established; interface reaches COMPLETED state.

testcase.name: wifi_status
testcase.description: Query WiFi interface status and verify connection details.

steps.step: Print SSID, band, channel, security, and RSSI.

testcase.expected_result: Status reports connected state with valid SSID and RSSI.

testcase.name: ping_gateway
testcase.description: Ping the default gateway to verify IP-level connectivity.
testcase.preconditions: WiFi is connected; DHCP has assigned an IP and gateway.

steps.step: Wait for echo reply (timeout: PING_TIMEOUT_SEC, retries: PING_ATTEMPTS).

testcase.expected_result: At least one ICMP echo reply received from gateway.

testcase.name: wifi_disconnect
testcase.description: Disconnect from the WiFi network gracefully.

testcase.name: wifi_reconnect
testcase.description: Reconnect to the WiFi network after a disconnect.
testcase.expected_result: Reconnection succeeds; interface in COMPLETED state.

testcase.name: repeated_scan
testcase.description: Perform multiple consecutive WiFi scans to verify scan stability.
testcase.preconditions: WiFi interface is up; firmware is healthy.

steps.step: Each iteration: reset count, issue scan, wait for completion.
Verify each scan finds at least one AP.

testcase.expected_result: All scan iterations complete successfully with APs found.

testcase.name: connect_disconnect_cycle
testcase.description: Perform multiple connect/disconnect cycles to verify driver stability.
testcase.preconditions: WiFi interface is up; firmware is healthy.

steps.step: Each cycle: connect with retry, verify COMPLETED, disconnect, verify success.

testcase.expected_result: All cycles complete; each connect reaches COMPLETED and each disconnect succeeds.

testcase.name: scan_timing
testcase.description: Benchmark WiFi scan completion time over multiple runs.
testcase.preconditions: WiFi interface is up; firmware is healthy.

steps.step: Run 3 scans, measuring wall-clock time for each.
Print per-scan time and AP count.

testcase.expected_result: All scans succeed; average scan time reported.

testcase.name: connect_timing
testcase.preconditions: WiFi interface is up; firmware is healthy; valid credentials.

steps.step: Measure time from connect request to COMPLETED state.
Print connect time, SSID, channel, and RSSI.

testcase.expected_result: Connection succeeds; connect time reported in ms.

testcase.name: ping_latency
testcase.description: Measure ICMP ping round-trip latency to gateway (min/avg/max).
testcase.preconditions: WiFi is connected; gateway is reachable.

steps.step: Send 5 ICMP echo requests to gateway, measuring RTT for each.

testcase.expected_result: Ping latency stats reported; at least 3/5 pings succeed.

testcase.name: connect_wrong_ssid
testcase.description: Attempt to connect with a non-existent SSID; verify graceful failure.

steps.step: Verify connect fails or is rejected.
Verify interface is NOT in COMPLETED state.

testcase.expected_result: Connection fails; interface remains disconnected; no crash.

testcase.name: disconnect_not_connected
testcase.description: Issue disconnect when already disconnected; verify no crash or hang.

steps.step: Verify no crash; accept any return code.
Verify interface is NOT in COMPLETED state.

testcase.expected_result: System remains functional; no hang or crash.

testcase.name: connect_wrong_psk
testcase.description: Attempt to connect with correct SSID but wrong PSK; verify auth failure.
testcase.warning: On CYW43439 (1YN), this test may cause a firmware TRAP (crash). Placed LAST intentionally — firmware may be non-functional after this test.

steps.step: Issue connect with valid SSID and wrong PSK "WrongPassword123!".
Verify connect fails or is rejected.
Verify interface is NOT in COMPLETED state.

testcase.expected_result: Connection fails; interface not in COMPLETED state.
testcase.known_issues: CYW43439 firmware may crash (TRAP) during WPA handshake with wrong PSK.
